title: Notion Inspired Vector Mascot Logo AI
sourceTitle: Notion Inspired Vector Mascot Logo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist high-contrast Notion-inspired vector mascot logo based on friendly bald founder with round glasses, trimmed beard, thick eyebrows, and a small confident smile. Subject: adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. Only the head of friendly bald founder with round glasses, trimmed beard, thick eyebrows, and a small confident smile appears from a 3/4 angle, preserving recognizable traits such as hairstyle or bald head, beard outline, glasses, eyebrows, smile, and friendly expression. Scene: Pure white background. provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: 1:1 square composition with balanced head silhouette, symmetrical visual weight, thick bold black outer strokes, and slightly thinner inner detail lines. Signature Elements: Preserved notion inspired vector mascot logo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Clean SVG-like vector logo aesthetic inspired by Notion avatars: flat monochrome fill, strong geometric simplification, sharp edges, bold contrast, and modern startup mascot polish. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: the mascot head alone is the logo asset. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
